query:
SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM posts GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT id, handle, platform, accountType FROM instagram_accounts LIMIT 10;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3F5sJN7FajWtXbb.root --database 3LYkMyiPgdB2gzxf44Hk3M --execute SELECT status, COUNT(*) as total FROM posts GROUP BY status ORDER BY total DESC;
SELECT id, handle, platform, accountType FROM instagram_accounts LIMIT 10;
